title: K2: split read-only fab_pending out of fab_review
description: Extract the two READ actions (list + search) of fab_review into a NEW read-only MCP tool fab_pending (readOnlyHint:true, idempotentHint:true). fab_review keeps ONLY the 6 write actions (approve/reject/modify/modify-content/modify-layer/defer). Pure relocation — the new tool reuses the EXISTING list/search input filters + output item shapes verbatim, ZERO behavior change. Atomic cross-end migration: every skill SKILL.md / ref / shared-policy / test that calls fab_review with action list|search MUST move to fab_pending in the SAME PR, and list/search MUST be removed from the FabReview* unions + FabReviewInputShape enum. Constraints C-001 (do NOT touch modify-content/modify-layer separation), C-002 (read tool honest readOnlyHint:true), C-006/C-007 (atomic migration + rebuild shared).
action: 1) packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts: lift the `list` + `search` discriminatedUnion branches out of FabReviewInputSchema (~line 957) into a NEW `FabPendingInputSchema = z.discriminatedUnion('action', [<list branch>, <search branch>])`; lift the matching `list`+`search` branches out of FabReviewOutputSchema (~line 1147) into `FabPendingOutputSchema`; add a flattened `FabPendingInputShape` (ZodRawShape, action enum = ['list','search']) mirroring the FabReviewInputShape pattern (the MCP SDK 1.29.0 crashes on a discriminatedUnion inputSchema); add `fabPendingAnnotations = { readOnlyHint: true, idempotentHint: true, ... }` mirroring the recall annotations at line 248. REMOVE 'list' and 'search' from FabReviewInputSchema, FabReviewOutputSchema, and the FabReviewInputShape action enum (~line 1023 — leaves ['approve','reject','modify','modify-content','modify-layer','defer']). Keep the _fabReviewFiltersSchema / _fabReviewListItemSchema helpers shared (referenced by both). Do NOT alter the 6 write branches. 2) packages/server/src/tools/review.ts: move the list/search handler code into a NEW registerPending in packages/server/src/tools/pending.ts that re-parses via FabPendingInputSchema.parse and registers `fab_pending` with FabPendingInputShape + fabPendingAnnotations; review.ts registerReview drops list/search handling and re-parses the 6-write FabReviewInputSchema. 3) packages/server/src/index.ts: add `registerPending(server, tracker);` next to the existing 4 registrations (registerReview is at line 242). 4) Migrate every caller (see files[]).

criteria: RED FIRST: a new packages/server/src/tools/pending.test.ts asserts `fab_pending` handles action=list and action=search and is registered with annotations readOnlyHint:true,idempotentHint:true — written BEFORE the impl so it fails to resolve registerPending.
node/Grep zero-residual: `grep -n 'fab_pending' packages/server/src/index.ts` shows registerPending registered alongside the existing 4 tools.

FabReviewInputSchema and FabReviewOutputSchema discriminatedUnions no longer contain a z.literal('list') or z.literal('search') branch; FabReviewInputShape action enum is exactly ['approve','reject','modify','modify-content','modify-layer','defer'] (assert via a unit test mirroring the existing Shape-vs-union drift test in review.test.ts).
FabPendingInputSchema / FabPendingInputShape / FabPendingOutputSchema / fabPendingAnnotations all exist in api-contracts.ts and carry exactly the list+search variants.
C-001 preserved: modify-content and modify-layer remain distinct write branches in FabReviewInputSchema (assert both literals still present).

Cross-end migration zero-residual (Grep tool / node fs, NOT bash ugrep): in packages/cli/templates/skills/** every `fab_review action="list"` and `fab_review action="search"` (and `fab_review search`) is replaced by `fab_pending action="list"`/`fab_pending action="search"`; node census of /fab_review\s+(action\s*=\s*"?(list|search)|search)/ over packages/cli/templates/skills returns ZERO.
lib/shared-policy.md lists fab_pending alongside fab_review (read tool added to the policy tool list).
fabric-review/SKILL.md allowed-tools / fabric-archive/SKILL.md allowed-tools include fab_pending where they previously relied on fab_review list/search.

list/search handler tests previously in review.test.ts are moved to pending.test.ts; review.test.ts no longer references action:'list'/'search' handlers (node grep returns ZERO list/search action assertions in review.test.ts).
`pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build` succeeds (run BEFORE server tests — schema changed).
fabric-server vitest green (pending.test.ts + review.test.ts + index.test.ts) AND fabric-cli vitest green (skill/template lint incl. retired-reference lint sees no stale fab_review list/search).
convergence.definition_of_done: AI agents and the Fabric skills call a read-only fab_pending tool for browsing/searching pending knowledge (honestly tagged readOnlyHint:true), while fab_review is now write-only. No skill, ref, policy, or test still routes list/search through fab_review, and the shared schema, server, and CLI test suites are all green.

files.change: Lift list+search branches into new FabPendingInputSchema/FabPendingInputShape/FabPendingOutputSchema + fabPendingAnnotations(readOnlyHint:true,idempotentHint:true); remove list/search from FabReview* unions and the Shape action enum; keep _fabReviewFiltersSchema/_fabReviewListItemSchema shared.

New registerPending(server,tracker): registers fab_pending with FabPendingInputShape + fabPendingAnnotations; handler re-parses via FabPendingInputSchema.parse and runs the relocated list/search logic verbatim.
Remove list/search handling; re-parse the 6-write FabReviewInputSchema only.
Add registerPending(server, tracker) alongside the existing 4 registrations; import registerPending.
RED-first: assert list+search via fab_pending, registered with readOnlyHint:true,idempotentHint:true; relocate the list/search handler tests from review.test.ts.

files.target: list/search handler tests + Shape-vs-union drift test
files.change: Delete list/search handler tests (moved to pending.test.ts); update the FabReviewInputShape drift test to expect the 6-write enum only.
Assert fab_pending is registered; update any fab_review action-list assertion.
Route list/search to fab_pending; add fab_pending to allowed-tools.
Dedupe-vs-canonical search → fab_pending search; add fab_pending to allowed-tools.
Add fab_pending (read) to the policy tool listing alongside fab_review (write).

files.target: Skills section referencing fab_review actions / fab_review search
files.change: Note fab_pending for read (list/search) where the bootstrap text routes list/search through fab_review.

implementation: RED: write packages/server/src/tools/pending.test.ts asserting fab_pending list+search behavior + readOnlyHint:true; run server tests → fails (no registerPending).

Edit api-contracts.ts: create FabPendingInputSchema/FabPendingInputShape/FabPendingOutputSchema + fabPendingAnnotations from the lifted list+search branches; remove list/search from FabReview* unions + Shape enum; keep shared filter/item helpers.
Create packages/server/src/tools/pending.ts (registerPending); strip list/search from review.ts; add registerPending to index.ts.
Move list/search handler tests from review.test.ts → pending.test.ts; update the Shape-vs-union drift test for the 6-write enum.
GREEN: server vitest green; `pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit` 0.
Migrate every skill SKILL.md / ref / shared-policy.md / .fabric/AGENTS.md list/search call site to fab_pending; run the node zero-residual census (must be 0).
fabric-cli vitest green (retired-reference lint passes); commit on a feature branch; open PR (PR #1 of 2).

success_metrics: no stale fab_review list/search in skills (node census=0)

reference.pattern: Follow the existing FabReviewInputShape (flattened ZodRawShape) + discriminatedUnion Schema pairing and the recall annotations literal (api-contracts.ts:248 readOnlyHint:true,idempotentHint:true).

rationale.chosen_approach: Pure relocation reusing existing filter/item schemas keeps behavior identical (C-002 honest read/write split) while a separate PR isolates this high cross-end-contract risk for clean rollback.
rationale.tradeoffs: New tool adds one more registration surface, but the honest readOnlyHint:true tag lets hosts/AI call the read path safely — the whole point of the split.

risks: CROSS-END WIRE MIGRATION: stale fab_review list/search refs in skill SKILL.md/ref/shared-policy will silently break AI callers — use node/Grep zero-residual census, NOT bash ugrep (false negatives on alternation).
SHARED SCHEMA: forgetting `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build` after editing api-contracts.ts → runtime invalid_union_discriminator. Rebuild BEFORE server tests.
MCP SDK 1.29.0 crashes on discriminatedUnion inputSchema → fab_pending MUST ship the flattened FabPendingInputShape, not the union, as its registerTool inputSchema.
retired-reference lint (C-006) will flag any un-migrated caller — keep it as the safety net but do not rely on it to find them all.
